POD5 Vault

Category: Reverse Engineering
Difficulty: Easy-Medium

A tiny Java utility protects access to a vault.
It accepts one input and returns access granted or denied.
Recover the valid flag by reverse engineering the bytecode.

Run:
  java Pod5Vault
or
  java Pod5Vault "CH4KR4X2{example}"

Flag format:
  CH4KR4X2{...}
